message:
fix: retry transient WriteZero errors in SSE streaming providers

Transient WriteZero errors in the SSE event source were previously
treated as immediately fatal, dropping the entire stream. Add a
per-stream write_zero_count counter that tolerates up to 5 consecutive
WriteZero errors before treating the condition as fatal. Applied
uniformly to azure, cohere, gemini, and vertex providers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
